hemisphere_emphasis.interpretive_hint: The chart has a stronger private or interior emphasis.

signals.title: Ascendant in Scorpio
signals.summary: Ascendant falls in Scorpio, giving the chart a concrete orientation through this angle.
signals.interpretive_hint: Use the Ascendant as the chart's immediate orientation: embodiment, instinctive style, and first impression through Scorpio qualities.

signals.title: Sun in Capricorn, house 2
signals.summary: Sun is placed in Capricorn and the Resources house, emphasizing this chart factor through a concrete, readable placement.
signals.interpretive_hint: Sun expresses through Capricorn qualities in the field of Resources.

signals.title: Moon in Pisces, house 4
signals.summary: Moon is placed in Pisces and the Home house, emphasizing this chart factor through a concrete, readable placement.
signals.interpretive_hint: Moon expresses through Pisces qualities in the field of Home.

signals.title: Strong concentration in Capricorn, house 2
signals.summary: 4 chart factors are concentrated in Capricorn and the Resources house, giving extra interpretive weight to this area of the chart.
signals.interpretive_hint: Read this as a repeated emphasis: Capricorn qualities are focused through the themes of the Resources house.

signals.title: Saturn strongly placed in Capricorn
signals.summary: Saturn is in Capricorn, a sign where its function is reinforced by domicile.
signals.interpretive_hint: Treat Saturn in Capricorn as a domicile modifier for the existing placement signal.

signals.title: Mars in Sagittarius, house 1
signals.summary: Mars is placed in Sagittarius and the Self house, emphasizing this chart factor through a concrete, readable placement.
signals.interpretive_hint: Mars expresses through Sagittarius qualities in the field of Self.

signals.title: Jupiter strongly placed in Cancer
signals.summary: Jupiter is in Cancer, a sign where its function is reinforced by exaltation.
signals.interpretive_hint: Treat Jupiter in Cancer as an exaltation modifier for the existing placement signal.

signals.title: Mercury in Capricorn, house 3
signals.summary: Mercury is placed in Capricorn and the Communication house, emphasizing this chart factor through a concrete, readable placement. Its retrograde motion adds a reflective or revising layer to the placement.
signals.interpretive_hint: Mercury expresses through Capricorn qualities in the field of Communication. Read the retrograde state as a modifier for pacing, review, and internal processing.

signals.title: Venus in Aquarius, house 3
signals.summary: Venus is placed in Aquarius and the Communication house, emphasizing this chart factor through a concrete, readable placement. Its retrograde motion adds a reflective or revising layer to the placement.
signals.interpretive_hint: Venus expresses through Aquarius qualities in the field of Communication. Read the retrograde state as a modifier for pacing, review, and internal processing.

signals.title: Midheaven in Leo
signals.summary: Midheaven falls in Leo, giving the chart a concrete orientation through this angle.
signals.interpretive_hint: Use the MC as public direction and visibility, colored by Leo qualities.

signals.title: Jupiter in Cancer, house 8
signals.summary: Jupiter is placed in Cancer and the Transformation house, emphasizing this chart factor through a concrete, readable placement. Its dignity context adds heightened visibility and constructive emphasis. Its retrograde motion adds a reflective or revising layer to the placement.
signals.interpretive_hint: Jupiter expresses through Cancer qualities in the field of Transformation. Its dignity context adds heightened visibility and constructive emphasis. Read the retrograde state as a modifier for pacing, review, and internal processing.

signals.title: Jupiter opposition Uranus
signals.summary: Jupiter and Uranus form an opposition with 0.76 degrees of orb; the phase is separating.
signals.interpretive_hint: Read this opposition as a polarity to balance between Jupiter and Uranus, with attention to the separating phase.
